news.headline: Bybit tops up rewards for WSOT 2024, world's 2nd largest crypto exchange, triggers airdrop frenzy in selected markets.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 17, 2024, Bybit, the global cryptocurrency exchange ranking second in trading volume, has initiated a new airdrop and rewards campaign to garner excitement for the World Series of Trading (WSOT) 2024. This initiative is aimed at users in specific markets in South...

news.headline: BSV Blockchain launches W3C Community Group to integrate blockchain technology into Internet standards. Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: In Zug, Switzerland on October 17, 2024, BSV Blockchain unveiled the establishment of the World Wide Web Consortium (W3C) Blockchain2 Community Group. This initiative focuses on incorporating blockchain technology into Internet standards for web applications. The group aims to explore various ways to intertwine blockchain and web technology to enhance online functionalities.

news.headline: Crypto advocate Jameson Lopp responds to Elizabeth Warren's accusations against John Deaton, outlines expected ROI in Senate run against Warren; details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Jameson Lopp, a well-known Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) expert, discussed his predictions concerning John Deaton, a candidate who supports cryptocurrencies and is competing against Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) for a Senate seat. The clash between the two politicians regarding cryptocurrencies occurred during a recent debate, where Warren accused Deaton of receiving backing from major cryptocurrency figures seeking a return on investment (ROI). In response to this claim, Lopp expressed his anticipated ROI from Deaton should he emerge victorious in the election. This incident unfolded after Warren raised doubts about Deaton's crypto backers desiring an ROI on their support. More details on this exchange can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Apple and BYD collaborated on high-capacity EV battery technology in secret, Bloomberg reports.
Consumers avoiding fast shipping to cut costs amidst financial strains, per Bloomberg.
Flexographic printing market to reach US$5.38 billion by 2034, with North America holding 24.6% share in 2024. East Asia market revenue estimated at US$655.9 million in 2024.
news.summary: The global Flexographic Printing Technology Market is predicted to reach $2.86 billion by 2024, with a projected 6.5% CAGR over the next decade. The packaging industry is growing due to increased consumer demand and safety regulations, especially in sectors like food, pharmaceuticals, e-commerce, and personal care. Flexographic printing is preferred for its versatility in printing on various substrates and fast, high-quality flexible packaging production. North America holds a significant market share due to a focus on sustainability and eco-friendly materials. The East Asia market is rapidly growing due to modernization and increasing consumer demand. The overall market is expected to reach $5.38 billion by 2034, with North America holding 24.6% market share in 2024, and the East Asia market generating $655.9 million in revenue the same year. Sales of stack-type press are projected to rise at a 6.6% CAGR between 2024 and 2034.

news.headline: UK Transition-Finance Plan aims to tackle banker 'paralysis' (Bloomberg)
Snap-on announces Q3 2024 results: Diluted EPS $4.70, operating margin 22.0%.
news.summary: Snap-on reported its operating results for the third quarter of 2024 in Kenosha, Wisconsin. The company disclosed a diluted EPS of $4.70 and an operating margin of 22.0% before financial services.

news.headline: KeyCorp reported a Q3 2024 net loss of $(447) million, with an adjusted net income of $290 million. Received $821 million investment from Scotiabank. Tier 1 ratio at 10.8%, Tangible Common Equity at 6.2%. Net interest income increased by 7% and client deposits up by 4% year-over-year.
news.summary: Recently, a strategic minority investment of $821 million was received from Scotiabank. The Common Equity Tier 1 ratio is currently at 10.8% and the Tangible Common Equity ratio stands at 6.2%. There has been a 7% increase in net interest income compared to the previous quarter. Average deposits have also risen by 2.5%. Moreover, client deposits have seen a 4% increase in comparison to the previous year.

news.headline: CMC's Q4 net earnings are $103.9M, with annual net earnings at $485.5M. Consolidated core EBITDA is $227.1M in Q4.
news.summary: In the last quarter, the company reported a net profit of $103.9 million, equivalent to $0.90 per diluted share. For the entire year, the net earnings stood at $485.5 million, or $4.14 per diluted share. The consolidated core EBITDA for the fourth quarter was $227.1 million, with a core EBITDA margin of 11.4%. Robust construction activity contributed significantly to maintaining stability in the company's performance.

news.headline: Aveanna Healthcare to release Q3 results on Nov 7, 2024, with a conference call at 10:00 am ET. (NASDAQ: AVAH)
news.summary: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. disclosed that it will unveil its third quarter performance data on November 7, 2024, prior to the market opening. This announcement was made by the company based in Atlanta on October 17, 2024. Subsequently, a conference call is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the very same day to discuss the results. Aveanna is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AVAH.

news.headline: APIContext joins Akamai Qualified Compute Partner Program. Akamai Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM) welcomes latest addition.
news.summary: The tech company Akamai Technologies Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed on October 17, 2024, that APIContext has become the newest member of the Akamai Qualified Compute Partner Program. Akamai, listed on the NASDAQ as AKAM, is known for providing cloud services designed to enhance and safeguard online experiences. This partnership reflects APIContext's commitment to collaboration within this tech ecosystem.

news.headline: Transocean Ltd. secures $193M contract for Deepwater Conqueror drillship in US Gulf of Mexico starting Oct 2025.
news.summary: In Steinhause, Switzerland, on October 17, 2024, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) revealed securing a one-year contract for the Deepwater Conqueror with a U.S. Gulf of Mexico operator whose identity remains undisclosed. The contract, set to start in October 2025, is anticipated to bring in roughly $193 million in backlog for Transocean, encompassing supplementary services as well.

news.headline: Teleflex (NYSE:TFX) will have a conference call on Oct 31, 2024, at 8 a.m. ET to discuss Q3 financial results.
news.summary: Teleflex Incorporated, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker TFX, is scheduled to conduct a conference call on October 31, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. ET in Wayne, Pennsylvania. The call will focus on the financial results for the third quarter of that year, as well as offer insights into the company's operations. This update will be important for investors and stakeholders to gain a comprehensive understanding of Teleflex's performance during that quarter.

news.headline: Azimut and SOQUEM announce positive lithium recoveries & grades in metallurgical test at Galinée Property, Quebec.
news.summary: In Longueuil, Quebec, on October 17, 2024, Azimut Exploration Inc. announced positive initial metallurgical test findings for three samples of spodumene-rich pegmatite from the Galinée Property in Quebec's Eeyou Istchee James Bay area. The joint venture project between Azimut and SOQUEM Inc., with Azimut overseeing operations, yielded promising results. The company's stock is listed as TSXV: AZM.

news.headline: Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd. reports Q3 2024 production results, set for record production year. Financial results out Nov 6.
news.summary: Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd. (TSX: WDO, OTCQX: WDOFF) has released its production figures for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The company will unveil its financial results for Q3 2024 after the market closes on November 6, 2024. They plan to host a conference call and webcast the next day for investors and stakeholders to discuss the numbers. Investors and interested individuals should keep an eye out for the upcoming financial information to be shared.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 17, 2024, Orezone Gold Corporation (TSX: ORE, OTCQX: ORZCF) shared its Q3 2024 gold production update from the Bomboré Gold Mine.

news.headline: Ether's value has dropped over the past seven months due to 'L1 wars', with Solana's scalability posing a challenge for Ether maximalists.
news.summary: The scalability approach of Solana, with its monolithic design, is regarded as a significant challenge to Ether maximalists, representing a major obstacle to their beliefs according to the analyst, making Solana a formidable competitor in the blockchain space.

news.headline: Nansen now offers Solana analytics for tracking onchain activity, enhancing memecoin alpha's performance.
news.summary: Analytics company Nansen recently finalized the incorporation of Solana analytics, enhancing their services with up-to-the-minute tools for monitoring onchain activity. This integration aims to provide users with comprehensive insights into the Solana blockchain, enabling them to keep track of transactions, wallets, and other relevant data in real time.

news.headline: Illegal trading by insiders occurs in the crypto market, which can lead to manipulation and penalties.
news.summary: Trading based on non-public information is deemed unethical and potentially illegal, leading to worries about market manipulation within the cryptocurrency sector. The unauthorized use of confidential data to make investment decisions can distort market dynamics and harm other investors. It is critical to uphold transparency and integrity in the financial markets to ensure fair and equitable trading practices.

news.headline: Bitcoin traders fear a significant price drop before a Q4 2024 rally, as analysts predict a possible corrective move.
news.summary: Experts monitoring the cryptocurrency market anticipate that the price of Bitcoin could experience a slight dip, described as a "corrective move," before potentially surging significantly in the fourth quarter of 2024. This prediction suggests that there may be a period of adjustment before a potential upswing in the value of Bitcoin in the specified timeframe.

The net income for the nine-month period concluding in September was...

news.headline: Parsons Corporation wins $225M US Army Corps of Engineers contract for environmental remediation in Kansas City District, includes Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act projects.
news.summary: In Chantilly, Virginia, on October 17, 2024, Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) revealed that it secured a place on a multiple award task order contract (MATOC) from the United States Army Corps of Engineers (USACE) Kansas City District. The contract, valued at $225 million, is designated for environmental remediation initiatives. It encompasses a base period of one year and offers four additional one-year option periods. This agreement signifies new endeavors for the company and involves projects financed by the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. These projects aim to assist Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) cleanup efforts that safeguard public health and well-being.

MolecuLight Corp.'s fluorescence imaging is revolutionizing biofilm detection in wound care.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, MolecuLight Corp., a leading company in fluorescence imaging technology for identifying harmful bacteria in wound care, has been recognized for providing the most efficient approach to bedside biofilm detection. This acknowledgment comes from a significant study titled "Assessing..." conducted recently. The results of this study highlight MolecuLight Corp.'s effectiveness in this area. With their innovative technology, MolecuLight Corp. continues to lead the way in detecting harmful bacteria in real-time, improving the quality of wound care. This achievement further solidifies their position as a global pioneer in this field.

Global Blue will announce Q2 and H1 FY2024/25 financial results on Nov 22, 2024, before the market opens.
news.summary: In Signy, Switzerland, Global Blue Group Holding AG (NYSE: GB and GB.WS) will be announcing its financial results for the second quarter and half year period ended September 30, 2024, on November 22, 2024, before the market opens. The report will be released on Form 6-K and will feature Management’s Discussion and Analysis of the Financial Position and Results of Operations along with Consolidated Financial Statements, Notes, a press release, and information for investors.

news.headline: Muller family in Namibia protect endangered white rhino genetics through Rhino Momma Project. Passionate conservation effort.
news.summary: In Namibia's Kunene Region on October 17, 2024, an initiative is underway focused on the conservation of the endangered white rhino population and safeguarding its distinct genetics. The Rhino Momma Project (RMP) has been established with a dedicated commitment to the responsible and ethical preservation of these rhinos.

news.headline: Alchip shares keys to 3DIC design optimization, detailing advanced tech challenges undertaken by two industry leaders.
news.summary: Two leading companies have taken on challenging advanced technology tasks. The initiative involves significant investment, with costs totaling in the millions. The effort will require the collaboration of over 500 skilled professionals and is expected to take several years to complete. This ambitious project aims to push the boundaries of current technology and revolutionize the industry.

US Treasury Secretary Yellen: China's policies are leading to industrial overcapacity, threatening American firms and workers, and hurting economic resilience.

Monroe Capital backs Izzio Artisan Bakery's growth with senior credit facility in Louisville, CO. Founded in 1994, the bakery specializes in traditional sourdough breads for U.S. grocery store chains.
news.summary: In Chicago, Monroe Capital LLC disclosed its role as the sole lead arranger and administrative agent in securing a senior credit facility to aid in the expansion of Izzio Artisan Bakery. Established in 1994 in Louisville, CO, Izzio Artisan Bakery, a family-owned wholesale bakery specializing in traditional sourdough breads, caters mainly to U.S. grocery store chains. Known for its quality, the bakery enjoys recognition from both end consumers and store buyers.

news.headline: ChipMOS to report Q3 2024 financial results; leading OSAT provider; Stock Exchange: 8150; Nasdaq: IMOS.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Hsinchu, ChipMOS TECHNOLOGIES INC., a prominent outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services provider, revealed its plan to release third-quarter financial results. The company is listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange under the symbol 8150 and on Nasdaq as IMOS.

news.headline: Jujutsu Kaisen Phantom Parade hits 5M pre-registrations before Nov. 7 launch; new PV revealed. (Including date & company)
news.summary: In Shanghai on October 17, 2024, BILIBILI HK LIMITED revealed a new PV and disclosed plans for a community event. The company proudly shared that Jujutsu Kaisen Phantom Parade has achieved over 5 million pre-registrations globally. To mark this important achievement, a new promotional video will be released in conjunction with the event.

news.headline: Digitate releases ignio™ Flamingo, boosting AI capabilities for autonomous enterprises; includes unified observability.
news.summary: Digitate unveiled ignio™ Flamingo, now accessible to all customers, in Santa Clara, California. The release incorporates advanced AI functionalities across its acclaimed offerings, aiming to propel the concept of a self-sufficient business. Key aspects of Flamingo include Digitate’s combined comprehensive observability solution, improved generative AI (GenAI)-based AI Assist, the shift towards ticketless operations, and notable sustainability milestones. This marks a significant improvement in the company's services and solutions, contributing to a more efficient and eco-friendly operation.

news.headline: Intelsat introduces new satellite cellular backhaul service platform in Lagos, Nigeria, to bridge connectivity gaps in Sub-Saharan Africa.
news.summary: Intelsat, based in McLean, Virginia, has introduced a new satellite cellular backhaul service platform at the Open Access Datacenter (WIOCC) in Lagos, Nigeria. This move represents a significant step towards improving connectivity infrastructure in Nigeria and Africa. Despite some advancements, Sub-Saharan Africa still faces notable gaps in usage (59%) and coverage (15%). This new platform aims to address these challenges in the region.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Yellen: Sweeping and untargeted tariffs would raise prices for American Families and make US businesses less competitive.
WNS reports Q2 earnings for fiscal 2025, revises full year guidance.
news.summary: WNS, a global partner specializing in digital-led business transformation and services, recently disclosed its financial outcomes for the second quarter of the 2025 fiscal year that concluded on September 30, 2024. The company operates across major hubs like New York, London, and Mumbai. Known for its innovative solutions, WNS reported its earnings without specifying the figures from the source.

news.headline: RSA's Governance & Lifecycle named a leader in Identity Governance by KuppingerCole Analysts AG in 2024 report.
news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts, RSA, a leading identity security company, revealed that KuppingerCole Analysts AG recognized RSA® Governance & Lifecycle as a top leader in the 2024 Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) Leadership Compass Report. The report evaluates technology vendors to offer valuable insights for CISOs and security leaders overseeing IAM. RSA's Governance & Lifecycle was named an Overall, Product, Market, and Innovation Leader in the report. This signifies its top-tier performance in Identity Governance and Administration. This recognition highlights RSA's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions in the field of security.

news.headline: Commerce Bancshares, Inc. Q3 earnings per share at $1.07, net income $138.0 million, a rise from last year, steady from Q2.
news.summary: Commerce Bancshares, Inc. reported earnings of $1.07 per share for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, a rise from $.92 per share in the same period last year and consistent with the second quarter of 2024. The net income for the third quarter of 2024 reached $138.0 million, an increase from $120.6 million in the third quarter of 2023 but less than the prior quarter's $139.6 million. The earnings per share for the nine months ending September 30, 2024, totaled $3.00.

news.headline: Kvika banki hf. to approve financial statements for Q3 and first 9 months of 2024 on Nov 6. Results to be published after market close.
news.summary: On Wednesday, November 6, the Board of Directors of Kvika banki hf. will review and approve the financial statements for the Group covering the third quarter and the initial nine months of 2024. Following the board meeting, these financial statements will be disclosed to the public after the close of domestic markets.

news.headline: Fragrance solubilizers market to reach US$ 4,061.7 million by 2034 with 5.5% CAGR growth; North America captures 31.2% share in 2024.
news.summary: The Fragrance Solubilizers Market is projected to see significant growth, increasing from US$2,377.8 million in 2024 to US$4,061.7 million by 2034, with a growth rate of 5.5%. These solubilizers are essential in blending oil-based perfumes into water-based products like personal care items, cosmetics, and household cleaners, ensuring even distribution of scents. Factors like consumer demand for long-lasting scented products and eco-friendly options contribute to this market expansion. North America is anticipated to capture 31.2% market share by 2024, while Western Europe is expected to reach a 24.2% share. Natural fragrance solubilizers are predicted to see an absolute dollar opportunity of US$977.1 million between 2024 and 2034. Non-ionic solubilizers, with a 6% market share, are estimated to be worth US$1,631.2 million in 2024.

news.headline: JCPenney in Plano, Texas, is offering exclusive new products, collaborations, and experiences for the holiday season, with 'Gotta Have It' pricing and 'Really Big Deals' along with thousands of Black Friday offers.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, JCPenney is offering a variety of deals this holiday season, including 'Gotta Have It' pricing, 'Really Big Deals' throughout the season, and thousands of Black Friday offers. The company aims to assist customers in making the most of their holiday shopping experience.

news.headline: Workers at Pine Tree Park Care Home in Sydney are demanding a 10% raise after a six-month delay in wage increase.
news.summary: Employees of CUPE Local 3067 in Sydney, Nova Scotia, are advocating for a 10% raise that was promised to them over six months ago. They are urging their employer, New Dawn Enterprises, to implement a job classification change that will lead to the wage increase for workers at Pine Tree Park Care Home. The demonstration is set to take place at Pine Tree Park Care Home and New Dawn Properties in Sydney, where members of CUPE 3067 and their supporters will gather to push for the agreed-upon salary adjustment.

news.headline: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. reveals Q3 2024 financial performance.
